schema_doc: Each asset: id, path, name, category, description, size_m (intended rendered height in meters, used by loadAsset auto-fit), use_cases (scene types this fits in), tags (generous keywords for search), source, license, attribution.

assets.name: Gravestone
assets.description: A standard weathered rectangular tombstone with a rounded top.

assets.name: Human skull
assets.description: A stylized human skull — classroom-appropriate, not graphic.

assets.name: Shovel / spade
assets.description: A wooden-handled digging shovel with a metal blade.

assets.name: Dirt mound / fresh grave
assets.description: A rectangular mound of freshly-dug earth.

assets.name: Cypress tree
assets.description: A tall, narrow Mediterranean cypress — typical graveyard/funeral tree.

assets.name: Bare / dead tree
assets.description: A leafless tree with gnarled branches — winter or dead.

assets.name: Grass patch
assets.description: A low-poly patch of grass tufts.

assets.name: Lit candle
assets.description: A simple lit candle with flame.

assets.name: Wooden chair
assets.description: A simple wooden chair with a straight back.

assets.name: Wooden cross
assets.description: A plain wooden cross — grave marker or Christian symbol.

assets.name: Hanging chandelier
assets.description: An ornate hanging chandelier with multiple candle/bulb arms.

assets.name: Neutral human figure
assets.description: A blocky, stylized low-poly human figure — readable as mourner, gravedigger, villager, soldier depending on context.

assets.name: Armchair
assets.description: Upholstered armchair with padded arms and back.

assets.name: Rocking Chair
assets.description: Wooden rocking chair with curved rockers.

assets.name: Bed Single
assets.description: Simple single bed with pillow and sheet.

assets.name: Bed King
assets.description: Large bed, wider than a single.

assets.name: Night Stand
assets.description: Small bedside / side table with drawer.

assets.name: Kerosene Lamp
assets.description: Kerosene / oil lamp with glass chimney.

assets.name: Woman in Dress
assets.description: Adult female figure in a dress.

assets.name: Barn
assets.description: A large low-poly wooden barn suitable as the central ranch building.

assets.name: Small Barn
assets.description: A small stylized wooden outbuilding that works as a bunkhouse or shed.

assets.name: Hay
assets.description: Stylized square hay bale for barnyard or field dressing.

assets.name: Pitchfork
assets.description: Low-poly pitchfork for ranch-hand labor scenes.

assets.name: Bucket
assets.description: Simple wooden bucket suitable for chores or water.

assets.name: Wood Water Trough
assets.description: Wooden water trough for livestock or horses.

assets.name: Tower Windmill
assets.description: Tall rural windmill suitable for a ranch skyline.

assets.name: Tractor
assets.description: Stylized old tractor for 1930s farm scenes.

assets.name: Donkey
assets.description: Stylized low-poly donkey usable as a mule stand-in.

assets.name: Husky
assets.description: Stylized small dog (Husky) usable as a puppy stand-in.

assets.name: Bags
assets.description: A cluster of low-poly sacks suitable as grain/wheat sacks.

assets.name: Cowboy Hat
assets.description: Low-poly wide-brimmed hat suitable as a ranch straw hat.

assets.name: Boots
assets.description: A pair of work boots for ranch-hand gear.

assets.name: Crate
assets.description: Low-poly wooden crate for storage scenes.

assets.name: Rope
assets.description: Coiled rope prop for ranch detail.

assets.name: Church
assets.description: Low-poly plain church suitable as a Puritan meeting house.

assets.name: House
assets.description: Stylized wooden house with steep roof, fits colonial aesthetic.

assets.name: Seat
assets.description: Simple low-poly bench usable as a church pew.

assets.name: Doll
assets.description: Small doll figure that can stand in as a Puritan poppet/rag doll.

assets.name: Cauldron
assets.description: Low-poly iron cauldron for forest ritual or cooking.

assets.name: Gavel
assets.description: Low-poly wooden gavel for courtroom scene.

assets.name: Door Straight
assets.description: Heavy wooden door suitable for colonial architecture.

assets.name: Wooden Sign
assets.description: Hanging wooden sign for shopfront or village detail.

assets.name: Fern
assets.description: Low-poly fern/greenery usable as drying herbs.

assets.name: Book
assets.description: Closed low-poly book as a Bible stand-in.

assets.name: Wood Bridge
assets.description: Small wooden footbridge for village/forest scenes.

assets.name: Hanging Lantern
assets.description: Hanging iron-style lantern for colonial atmosphere.

assets.name: Water bottle
assets.description: Simple water bottle as a canteen stand-in.

assets.name: Backpack
assets.description: Low-poly backpack usable as a military rucksack.

assets.name: Lighter
assets.description: Low-poly lighter for soldier personal effects.

assets.name: Radio
assets.description: Low-poly radio usable as a field radio.

assets.name: Sack Trench
assets.description: Stack of sandbags forming a wall.

assets.name: Banana Tree
assets.description: Low-poly banana tree for jungle scenes.

assets.name: Pond
assets.description: Small pond patch, usable as a mud puddle.

assets.name: Rope Bridge
assets.description: Rural wooden footbridge for jungle stream.

assets.name: Can
assets.description: Low-poly tin can usable as a C-ration/MRE can.

assets.name: Stone Tower
assets.description: Tall stone tower for castle fortifications.

assets.name: Window
assets.description: Arched tall window for stone walls.

assets.name: Flag
assets.description: Flag on pole for castle heraldry.

assets.name: Wall Towers
assets.description: Short parapet stone wall section with crenellation.

assets.name: Beach Umbrella
assets.description: Red and white striped beach umbrella.

assets.name: Leafy Tree
assets.description: Broad leafy tree stand-in for fig.

assets.name: Bedroll
assets.description: Narrow simple cot/bedroll for prison cell.

assets.name: Hut
assets.description: Round mud hut with thatched roof.

assets.name: Hooded Adventurer
assets.description: Standing hooded figure; recolor as red cloak.

assets.name: Hooded Stranger
assets.description: Hooded/cowled figure for winged bonnet handmaid.

assets.name: Woman Seated
assets.description: Seated woman figure for red-dress silhouette.

assets.name: Shelf Tall
assets.description: Tall stocked shelf for Korean market.

assets.name: Office Chair
assets.description: Visitor chair for hospital or office.

assets.description: Rice item stand-in for rice bag.
